name: screendrop-worker
description: Screendrop Cloud — screenshot sharing powered by Cloudflare Workers, R2, and D1

UPLOAD_TOKEN.description: Shared secret used to authenticate uploads from the Screendrop app. **Open Screendrop → Settings → Cloud, copy the generated token, and paste it here.** Do not leave this blank.

AUTHOR_NAME.description: Optional. Display name shown on shared pages (falls back to `Anonymous`).

AUTHOR_AVATAR.description: Optional. Avatar URL shown on shared pages, e.g. `https://github.com/your-username.png`.

GITHUB_CLIENT_ID.description: Optional. Enables 'Sign in with GitHub' for comments. Create an OAuth app at https://github.com/settings/developers with callback `https://<your-worker>/api/auth/callback/github`, then paste the client id here (and the secret below). Leave blank to keep anonymous commenting.

GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET.description: Optional. Client secret of the GitHub OAuth app above.

GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID.description: Optional. Enables 'Sign in with Google' for comments. Create an OAuth client at https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials (type: Web application) with redirect URI `https://<your-worker>/api/auth/callback/google`, then paste the client id here (and the secret below). Leave blank to keep anonymous commenting.

GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET.description: Optional. Client secret of the Google OAuth client above.
